name: Pistachio Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large package pistachio pudding mix, dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the pistachio pudding mix, Cool Whip, fruit cocktail, nuts, and chopped cherries.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 9 x 13 x 2 inch baking dish.
3. Chill until ready to serve.
4. Cut into desired size pieces.
5. Arrange cherry halves or pecan halves on every other piece before serving.
